form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Addington over 525m in 30.48. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 525m at Addington at Class 5 level. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Addington over 525m in 30.48. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 525m at Addington at Class 5 level. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Addington (31.31) in a Class 5, finishing a 11 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 10 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Addington (31.31) in a Class 5, finishing a 11 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 10 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.37) at Wanganui Straight in a Class 4, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and four places from 16 starts. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Ascot Park last time when a 2.25 lengths second but did record a slick 26.09 over the 457m trip. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at Ascot Park last time when a 2.25 lengths second but did record a slick 26.09 over the 457m trip. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 525m at Addington beaten 8 lengths (31.05) behind Opawa Postman in a Class 5 on March 26. Placed two back at Addington. Expected to bounce right back. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.87) at Ascot Park in a Class 5, finishing second and beaten 1.3 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Place prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Was edged out last time at Manawatu when beaten just a long neck but did clock a brilliant 25.83 for the 457m trip. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Manawatu (25.90) in a Class 5, finishing a 11 length sixth. Is yet to miss the placings from this box, including three wins. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked shortly after start and bumped approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 17.31 when third at Wanganui Straight latest but the run prior he recorded a speedy 25.88 over 457m finishing third at Manawatu. In form but this is a test.
